description: You've followed Uncle Adolf from beer-hall rabble-rouser to bunker-floor footnote — the rise, the reign, and the very bad Monday in 1945.
title_hint: To Be or Not to Be

description: Certified tourist of the Eastern Front. Winter coat optional, survival not guaranteed.
Sommelier of saltwater warfare — from Pearl Harbor smoke to the claustrophobic tin cans of the Atlantic.
Licensed aerial menace. Spitfires, Messerschmitts, and Zeroes — if it has a propeller and a grudge, you've watched it.
title_hint: Don't Look Now... We're Being Shot At!

description: Certified D-Day beachcomber. You stormed Normandy, punched through the Bulge, and took a detour behind enemy lines for good measure.
Pacific jungle package holiday — island-hopping the hard way, one ridge of black sand at a time.
You've borne witness to the Shoah on screen — stories of survival, rescue, and unbearable loss that every generation has to see.

achievement_name: Cracked the Code, Cracked Open a Cold One
description: Bletchley graduate and backline saboteur. Cyphers decrypted, castles infiltrated, Nazis generally inconvenienced.

achievement_name: Over the Top and Into the Mud
description: Great War enjoyer. You've blown a whistle, climbed a ladder, and watched the 20th century lose its innocence in a trench.
title_hint: All Quiet on the Western Front (1930)
All Quiet on the Western Front (2022)

description: Desert Rat diploma — sand in your boots, sand in your tank treads, and Rommel permanently on your six.
